Perfect! Both changes have been successfully applied. Here's a summary of the modifications made:
## Summary
I've successfully updated the user-facing output strings in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py`:
### Changes Made:
1. **Line 269**: Updated the label in the header section - Before: `_format_field("Plan session", ...)` - After: `_format_field("PR session", ...)`
2. **Line 356**: Updated the error message when a PR is not found - Before: `f"Plan #{plan_id} not found"` - After: `f"PR #{plan_id} not found"`
Both changes have been verified and are in place. The modifications only changed the user-visible output strings as requested, without altering any variable names, function names, class names, or internal comments.
